description:
Recto: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. The sender reports that he went to the house of Abū l-Manṣūr and read them the letter, to which they said they would send a response. He then reports on the letter which he was supposed to read to Mūsā. 

Verso: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Perhaps of a glass seller (من حق زجاج . . . اولا . . . وايضا . . . وايضا . . . وايضا . . . مبيوع من الزجاج) (Information in part from CUDL)
